debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

proof:
intro x hx
        have hx1 : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          have hx' : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v) := by simpa [S] using hx
          have hxa : μ - 2 * √v ≤ x := hx'.1
          have hxb : x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := hx'.2
          have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith
          have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith
          exact abs_le.mpr ⟨h2, h1⟩
        have hx2 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
          calc
            |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by ring_nf
            _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by simpa using abs_add μ (x - μ)
            _ ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by gcongr
        have ht : |t * x| ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
          calc
            |t * x| = |t| * |x| := by simpa [abs_mul]
            _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by gcongr
        have : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := by
          apply Real.exp_le_exp.mpr
          have : t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self (t * x)
          exact le_trans this ht
        simpa [abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos (t * x))] using this
failed_attempts:
intro x hx
      have habs : |Real.exp (t * x)| = Real.exp (t * x) := by
        simp [abs_of_nonneg (Real.exp_pos _).le]
      rw [habs]
      have htx : t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := by
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self (t * x)
          _ = |t| * |x| := by simp [abs_mul]
          _ = |t| * |x| := by ring
      have hle : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        have hx' : μ - 2 * √v ≤ x ∧ x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := by simpa [S, Icc] using hx
        have hxabs : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith [hx'.2]
          have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith [hx'.1]
          exact abs_le.mpr ⟨h2, h1⟩
        have hxtri : |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by
          have : x = μ + (x - μ) := by ring
          simpa [this, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
            (abs_add μ (x - μ))
        calc
          |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := hxtri
          _ ≤ |μ| + (2 * √v) := add_le_add_left hxabs _
      have hmul : |t| * |x| ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hle (abs_nonneg t)
      have htx' : t * x ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := le_trans htx (by simpa [mul_assoc] using hmul)
      exact (Real.exp_le_exp).2 htx'

intro x hx
      have hx' : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v) := hx
      have hx_abs : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        have hxμ : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          have hxL : μ - 2 * √v ≤ x := hx'.1
          have hxR : x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := hx'.2
          have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith
          have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith
          have : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
            have hpos : 0 ≤ (2 * √v : ℝ) := by positivity
            exact abs_le_of_le_of_neg_le h1 (by simpa [neg_mul] using h2)
          exact this
        calc
          |x| = |(x - μ) + μ| := by ring_nf
          _ ≤ |x - μ| + |μ| := by simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (x - μ) μ
          _ ≤ (2 * √v) + |μ| := by gcongr
          _ = |μ| + 2 * √v := by ring
      have h_exp_abs : |Real.exp (t * x)| = Real.exp (t * x) := by
        simp [abs_of_nonneg (Real.exp_nonneg _)]
      rw [h_exp_abs]
      have htx : t * x ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := by
            simpa [mul_assoc] using (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_abs_self x) (abs_nonneg t))
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
            exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx_abs (abs_nonneg t)
      exact (Real.exp_le_exp.mpr htx)

intro x hx
      have hx_abs : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        have hx' : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v) := by simpa [S] using hx
        rcases hx' with ⟨hxL, hxR⟩
        have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith
        have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith
        have h3 : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          exact abs_le.mpr ⟨h2, h1⟩
        have : |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by
          have := abs_add (μ) (x - μ)
          have hxa : μ + (x - μ) = x := by ring
          simpa [hxa, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this
        exact le_trans this (by gcongr)
      have htx : |t * x| ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        simpa [abs_mul, mul_assoc] using (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx_abs (abs_nonneg t))
      have hexp : Real.exp (|t * x|) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) :=
        Real.exp_le_exp.mpr htx
      have habs : |Real.exp (t * x)| = Real.exp (t * x) := by
        simpa using (abs_of_nonneg (Real.exp_pos (t * x)).le)
      have ht : t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self (t * x)
      have hle : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t * x|) := Real.exp_le_exp.mpr ht
      have : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := le_trans hle hexp
      simpa [habs] using this

intro x hx
      have hxle : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        have hxμ : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          have hxL : μ - 2 * √v ≤ x := (by simpa [S, Icc] using hx).1
          have hxR : x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := (by simpa [S, Icc] using hx).2
          have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith
          have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith
          exact abs_le.mpr ⟨h2, h1⟩
        calc
          |x| = |(x - μ) + μ| := by ring_nf
          _ ≤ |x - μ| + |μ| := by simpa using abs_add (x - μ) μ
          _ ≤ (2 * √v) + |μ| := by gcongr; exact hxμ
          _ = |μ| + 2 * √v := by ac_rfl
      have ht : |t * x| ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        simpa [abs_mul] using mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hxle (abs_nonneg t)
      have hexp : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := by
        have : t * x ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := le_trans (le_abs_self _) ht
        exact Real.exp_le_exp.mpr this
      simpa using (le_trans (by simpa using (abs_exp (t * x)).le) hexp)

intro x hx
      have hx1 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        have hx' : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v) := hx
        have hxabs : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith [hx'.2]
          have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith [hx'.1]
          exact abs_le.mpr ⟨h2, h1⟩
        have : |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
            (abs_add (μ) (x - μ))
        exact le_trans this (by gcongr)
      have ht : |t * x| ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        simpa [abs_mul] using (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx1 (abs_nonneg t))
      have : Real.exp |(t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) :=
        Real.exp_le_exp.mpr ht
      simpa [abs_mul, abs_exp] using this

intro x hx
      have habs : |Real.exp (t * x)| = Real.exp (t * x) := by
        simp [abs_of_nonneg (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.exp (t * x))]
      rw [habs]
      have htx : t * x ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        have hxle : x ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
          have hx' : x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := (show x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v) from hx).2
          have hμ : μ ≤ |μ| := le_abs_self μ
          exact le_trans hx' (by linarith)
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t| * x := by nlinarith [le_abs_self t]
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
            have ht : 0 ≤ |t| := abs_nonneg t
            exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hxle ht
      exact (Real.exp_le_exp).2 htx

intro x hx
      have hx1 : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        rcases hx with ⟨hxL, hxR⟩
        have hxu : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith
          have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith
          exact abs_le.2 ⟨h2, h1⟩
        have hx2 : |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
            (abs_add x (-μ)).trans_eq (by ring_nf)
        have hx3 : |x| ≤ |x - μ| + |μ| := by
          have := abs_sub_le x μ 0
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this
        have : |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using (abs_add μ (x - μ))
        exact le_trans this (by nlinarith)
      have htx : |t * x| ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        simpa [abs_mul, mul_assoc] using mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx1 (abs_nonneg t)
      have hexp : Real.exp (|t * x|) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) :=
        Real.exp_le_exp.mpr htx
      simpa [Real.abs_exp] using (le_trans (by simpa using Real.exp_le_exp.mpr (le_abs_self (t * x))) hexp)

intro x hx
      have hxmu : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by

        exact habs
      have hxle : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        have : |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by ring_nf
        calc
          |x| = |μ + (x - μ)| := by

          _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by simpa using abs_add μ (x - μ)
          _ ≤ |μ| + (2 * √v) := by gcongr
      have htx : |t * x| ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
        simpa [abs_mul, mul_assoc] using mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hxle (abs_nonneg t)
      have hexp : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := by

        exact Real.exp_le_exp.mpr this
      simpa [abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos _)] using hexp

intro x hx

        have hxμ : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by

        exact Real.exp_le_exp.mpr this

intro x hx
      have hx_le : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        have hxabs : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by
          have hx' : x ∈ Icc (μ - 2 * √v) (μ + 2 * √v) := by simpa [S] using hx
          have hx1 : μ - 2 * √v ≤ x := hx'.1
          have hx2 : x ≤ μ + 2 * √v := hx'.2
          have h1 : x - μ ≤ 2 * √v := by linarith
          have h2 : -(2 * √v) ≤ x - μ := by linarith
          have : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := abs_le.mpr ⟨h2, h1⟩
          simpa using this
        have hμ : |μ| = |x - μ + x| := by
          have : x - μ + x = x + (x - μ) := by ring
          simp [abs_add, this]
        have hxle' : |x| ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
            (abs_add (x - μ) μ)
        have : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := le_trans hxle' (by gcongr)
        simpa [add_assoc] using this
      have h_exp : |Real.exp (t * x)| = Real.exp (t * x) := by
        simp [abs_of_pos (Real.exp_pos _)]
      rw [h_exp]
      have ht : t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := by
        have : t * x ≤ |t| * |x| := by
          simpa [mul_assoc, abs_mul] using (le_abs_self (t * x))
        exact this
      have hmono := Real.exp_monotone ht
      have hxmono : Real.exp (|t| * |x|) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)) := by
        apply Real.exp_monotone
        have : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := hx_le
        have ht' : 0 ≤ |t| := abs_nonneg t
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this ht'
      exact le_trans hmono hxmono

intro x hx
      have hxle : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √v := by
        rcases hx with ⟨hxL, hxR⟩
        have hx_sub : |x - μ| ≤ 2 * √v := by

          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √(v : ℝ)) := by
            have : |x| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √(v : ℝ) := hxabs
            exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this (abs_nonneg t)
      have : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √(v : ℝ))) :=
        (Real.exp_le_exp).2 htbound
      simpa [htexp]
